pending_tasks.task: Optimize Prompt AI for Gemini 2.5 Flash thinking capability

recent_changes.description: Fixed 'Unknown python error' by explicitly adding requests & defusedxml to Gradle pip block, and using PyObject.asMap() to correctly read Python dict keys in Kotlin.
Fixed build.gradle.kts python block syntax for Chaquopy 17.0 and eliminated unresolved PythonManager references
Removed legacy backend files (backend, Dockerfile, main.py)
Verified end-to-end Standalone flow with models/gemini-2.5-flash

errors_encountered.error: PyObject.get() returns null for Python dict keys
errors_encountered.solution: Use PyObject.asMap()[PyObject.fromJava('key')] to invoke __getitem__ instead of getattr when reading Python dicts in Kotlin.

errors_encountered.error: Chaquopy does not automatically install transitive dependencies for youtube-transcript-api
errors_encountered.solution: Explicitly added install('requests') and install('defusedxml') inside the chaquopy.pip block in build.gradle.kts.

errors_encountered.error: Text and buttons inside GlassCard are blurry and unreadable
errors_encountered.solution: Jetpack Compose Modifier.blur() blurred the entire component tree. Removed it from GlassCard so only the gradient is used.

decisions_made.reason: Standalone logic via local IP is now fully verified and bypasses YouTube blocks.
Superior thinking/reasoning capability for video summarization.
It blurs content, causing text/icons to be unreadable on Android S+ devices.
